content:
All Time High World is a collective of artists who fly high to reveal our planet in all its brilliance. Each artist flies high in search of a composition made possible by our planet and increasingly, how humans have shaped the world.

Visit ATH World on Foundation

You can also follow the ATH Twitter list of 88 artists who fly high in the pursuit of art.

All Time High World on Foundation

All Time High (ATH) World shows ways of collecting art photographed at altitude and features artists who see the world up high. All of the artists in ATH World enrich our world through the colors, shapes, lines and patterns imperceptible to us at ground level.

ATH World Curation

ATH World shows potential collecting avenues for collectors, art funds and traditional museums to pursue.

The first four All Time High World curation thematics are:

1) All Time High World Blue
2) All Time High World Painting
3) All Time High World City
4) All Time High World Quests

MintFace, Kurt Jurgen and Rob Alcaraz formed the inaugural ATH World curation panel each with experience flying drones and creating aerial art.

The four curation thematics arose naturally from the over 90 artists reviewed by the panel across SuperRare, Foundation, OpenSea, Rarible and Tezos marketplaces. New curation thematics will be released as artists release their work with these and new themes in mind.

Visit ATH World on Foundation

ATH World Blue

ATH World Blue explores our world through the singular color blue. 71% percent of the world is covered in water and ATH World artists brings us closer to the depth of blue we don't often get to see from our land locked lives.

13 ATH World Blue Artists so far

Visit ATH World on Foundation

ATH World Painting

ATH World Painting reveals a world of colour through expressive brushstrokes and motion made mostly by mother nature. ATH World Painting artists train their lens directly downwards, to capture a moment that is otherwise a blur to us ground bound beings.

9 ATH World Painting Artists
@a_iqb
@Anilprabhakar
@ArtjomKutuzov
@dailyoxygenpuff
@dbadgerNFT
@fabionegrao
@feliperossi
@gardarolafs
@RamizAksoy
...more ATH artists as they create for Painting thematic

Visit ATH World on Foundation

ATH World City

ATH World City brings the built environment into focus showing the many ways humanity has chosen to live and the architecture that shapes so much of how we live. Artists curated in ATH World City takes us to the heights of our homes to see just how much our landscapes have been sculpted by the needs and aspirations of our ever growing population.

11 ATH World City Artists

...more ATH artists as they create for City thematic

Visit ATH World on Foundation

ATH World Quest

ATH World Quest follows the adventure of the artist putting our shared humanity at the centre of the scene. ATH World Quest takes the viewer on the journey to the edge of the earth to explore places we might never see otherwise.

7 ATH World Quest Artists
@kurtjurgen_NFT
@gwartmotion
@sgrvisuals
@Colourwrk
@Tobiashagg
@sbdronesessions
@BenjaminHarley_
...more ATH artists as they create for Quest thematic

ATH World for Collectooors

Collectoors who begin their drone art acquisitions can expect to see new art across the four thematics added to All Time High (ATH) World.

Blue and Painting thematics are curated and ready to collect from.

City and Quest will be launched soon. We like aerial art. Most of all, we like living in an All Time High World.

Visit ATH World on Foundation

Join us on our journey of inspiration.

ATH World Curators
MintFace, Kurt Jurgen, Rob Alcaraz
